race.comment: YES WE ARE (6) resumes off a short break. He was a very smart winner first up at Sale last time in, sent around very short at Sandown Hillside last time out. He was a bit disappointing there but clearly has ability and can perform to his best here. BLAZE AWAY (4) resumes having won two on the bounce prior to a spell. He's fairly progressive and can measure up here fresh. MRS IGLESIA (8) was seventh at Caulfield Heath last time but was only beaten 0.6 lengths in a real dash home over 1000m. Her racing pattern makes things a bit tricky but she'll be slicing through. AQUEDUCT (1) was dominant winning here when last seen in slightly easier company and has to be respected off that. COMMANDS SUCCESS (2) is consistent and has each-way claims.
